data.title: Italy's trade show, KEY 2026, focuses on clean energy with 1,000 exhibitors, including 32% international, to be held in Rimini from March 4th to 6th. Europe and Africa are key players.
data.description: In early March 2026, the Italian Exhibition Group will host the KEY 2026 event at the Rimini Exhibition Center, featuring 1,000 brands showcasing their products. Notably, 32% of these brands are international, highlighting the event's global reach. The focus of the event is on Europe as a central player in the future of energy worldwide, with Africa also playing a significant role. The event, set to take place from March 4th to 6th in Rimini, Italy, promises to bring together industry leaders and experts to discuss and shape the future of the energy sector.

data.title: Coinbase to report Q4 earnings expectations at $1.05 per share, revenue at $1.84 billion - analysts' revised forecasts.
data.description: Coinbase Global, Inc. (NASDAQ: COIN) is set to announce its fourth-quarter earnings after the market closes on Thursday, February 12. Analysts are predicting earnings of $1.05 per share for the quarter, a decrease from $3.39 per share reported in the same period last year. The expected revenue for the quarter is $1.84 billion, lower than the $2.27 billion generated a year ago. Data from Benzinga Pro indicates that Coinbase has exceeded revenue expectations in seven of the last 10 quarters, including the most recent third quarter. The company's shares closed at $153.20 on Wednesday, marking a 5.7% decrease. For more details on analyst ratings, readers can visit the Analyst Stock Ratings page on Benzinga's website.

data.title: Franco-Nevada secures $250M royalty financing with i-80 Gold.
data.description: In a recent announcement on February 12, 2026, Franco-Nevada Corporation revealed its acquisition plans through a U.S. subsidiary. The company is set to acquire assets worth $250 million. Franca-Nevada, known as FNV on the Toronto Stock Exchange and NYSE, disclosed this new development.

data.title: Sanborn completed a 10-year NG9-1-1 geospatial cost study for Georgia, aiming to enhance emergency services.
data.description: Sanborn, a renowned geospatial solutions provider based in Colorado Springs, recently completed an extensive NG9-1-1 geospatial cost analysis for Georgia. The study encompasses a detailed examination of expenses related to Next Generation 9-1-1 services in the state.

data.title: CUPE 3912 NSCAD workers' negotiations at impasse as talks on first collective agreement fail; 133 academic workers involved.
data.description: In Halifax, NS, negotiations between the Nova Scotia College of Art and Design (NSCAD) unionized workers represented by Canadian Union of Public Employees (CUPE) Local 3912 and NSCAD University have hit a deadlock following unsuccessful conciliation discussions on Tuesday night. The 133 academic employees at NSCAD joined CUPE in 2023 and are currently in the process of establishing their initial collective bargaining agreement. The key points being addressed by NSCAD workers include demands for a just and impartial hiring process, as well as substantial job protections.

data.title: Aster, Hyperliquid, and Hedera surge as altcoins bounce with market cap on the rise, caution experts.
data.description: As alternative cryptocurrencies, also known as altcoins, see an increase in value, the overall market capitalization of the cryptocurrency market has also risen. However, despite this positive movement, experts are cautioning that a significant and lasting change in the market trend has yet to occur. The uptick in altcoins has caught the attention of investors, with notable gains being recorded. Nevertheless, the crypto market is being closely monitored as it continues to evolve.

data.title: Onity Group (NYSE: ONIT) Q4 earnings report: EPS $1.02 (missed by -57.32%), revenue up $65.20M YoY. Full details on Benzinga.
data.description: The Onity Group (NYSE: ONIT) recently revealed its Q4 earnings on February 12, 2026, at 6:45 AM. In the report, Onity Group fell short of estimated earnings by -57.32%, with an EPS of $1.02 compared to the expected $2.39. Additionally, the revenue saw an increase of $65.20 million from the corresponding period in the previous year. For further details on the company's earnings history and performance in the previous quarter, refer to Benzinga.com.

data.title: MatrixSpace releases Fusion 360, a portable multi-sensor drone detection system, enhancing airspace security with radar, optical tech.
data.description: A new portable drone detection system has been introduced by MatrixSpace in Burlington, Massachusetts on February 12, 2026. Known as the MatrixSpace Fusion 360, this multi-sensor technology combines radar, optical, and other sensors for accurate threat verification. This addition expands the company's portfolio for detecting real drone threats.

data.title: Bitcoin hits $68,000 after volatile period; $338.20 million liquidations in 24 hours; Bitcoin ETF sees $276.3 million outflows.
data.description: On Thursday morning, Bitcoin reached a price of $68,000 following a period of volatility that erased post-election gains. Liquidations in the last 24 hours amounted to $338.20 million. Bitcoin ETFs experienced net outflows of $276.3 million, while Ethereum ETFs saw net outflows of $129.18 million on Wednesday. Other cryptocurrency prices include Ethereum at $1,989.56, Solana at $81.85, XRP at $1.40, Dogecoin at $0.09385, and Shiba Inu at $0.056141. The meme coin sector increased by 2.1% to $33.6 billion after the broader crypto market rebounded. Cryptocurrency trader Jelle shared insights, as detailed in the full story accessible on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Sanofi CEO Paul Hudson removed, last day Feb 17, 2026. Belén Garijo new CEO, Olivier Charmeil as interim CEO. Changes for increased rigor.
data.description: Sanofi SA announced that Paul Hudson, their current Chief Executive Officer, will have his Director mandate not renewed, and he will be leaving his position on February 17, 2026, following a six-year tenure. Belén Garijo has been appointed as the new CEO and will assume the role after the Group's Annual General Meeting on April 29, 2026. The Board of Directors will propose Garijo's candidacy as a director to the shareholders. In the interim, Olivier Charmeil will serve as the Interim CEO. Garijo is expected to bring increased rigor to Sanofi's strategy implementation, focusing on strengthening productivity, governance, and innovation in Research & Development. Her priority will be to accelerate the Group's future preparations.

data.title: Driven Brands Holdings Inc. (NASDAQ: DRVN) to report Q4 & year-end results on Feb 25, 2026, with a conference call at 8:30 a.m. ET.
data.description: Charlotte, North Carolina-based company Driven Brands Holdings Inc. (NASDAQ: DRVN) is set to announce its financial results for the fourth quarter and full year ending on December 27, 2025. The report is scheduled to be released before the market opens on February 25, 2026. A conference call led by management will take place at 8:30 a.m. ET on the same day to discuss the Company's financial and operational highlights. The call will be accessible via webcast by visiting the Company’s Investor Relations webpage.

data.title: Baxter Intl Q4 earnings miss estimates by -32.08%, EPS $0.36 vs. estimate $0.53. Revenue up $221.00 million from last year.
data.description: Baxter Intl (NYSE: BAX) released its Q4 earnings report on Thursday, February 12, 2026, at 07:15 AM. The report revealed that the company missed estimated earnings by -32.08%, reporting an EPS of $0.36 compared to an estimate of $0.53. However, their revenue saw a significant increase of $221.00 million from the previous year. Despite falling short of earnings estimates, Baxter Intl has shown growth in revenue. For a more detailed analysis, the full story is available on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Aerospace titanium market to hit USD 2.9B by 2035, growing at 5.3% CAGR from 2025's USD 1.8B - FMI report.
data.description: In the year 2025, the Aerospace Titanium Market was valued at approximately $1.8 billion, as per Future Market Insights (FMI). FMI projects that by the year 2035, this market is expected to reach around $2.9 billion, showcasing a compound annual growth rate (CAGR) of 5.3%. The market is anticipated to exhibit steady growth with minimal fluctuations, supported by various factors.

data.description: The anticipated completion date for the recapitalization plan is the end of the first quarter of 2026. All monetary figures mentioned are in US dollars unless specified. The company involved is i-80 GOLD CORP. (TSX: IAU) (NYSE American: IAUX), based in Toronto.

data.title: Encora Therapeutics receives FDA clearance for Encora X1™ wearable device for Essential Tremor, after successful clinical studies.
data.description: In Boston, Encora Therapeutics, a prominent non-invasive neuromodulation technology company, revealed that the U.S. Food and Drug Administration (FDA) has approved the Encora X1™ after granting 510(k) clearance. This decision was based on information derived from two key clinical studies: a randomized, sham-controlled trial and a 90-day home-use study. The studies illustrated significant enhancements in tremor severity and performance of practical tasks, highlighting the device's efficacy in assisting with daily activities.
